LAW AND MOTION 302, THE HOLLINS LAW'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 8, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 29, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Centurion Bank,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant David Dulin,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $37,809.91
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $37,809.91

Judgment signed in open court.
